Acid Resistance.description: A suit of armor or a shield with this property normally has a dull gray appearance. The armor absorbs the first 10 points of acid damage per attack that the wearer would normally take (similar to the resist energy spell).
Acid Resistance.notes: Caster Level: 3rd Faint aura. Prerequisites: Craft Magic Arms and Armor , resist energy Price +18,000 gp.

Acid Resistance, Greater.description: As acid resistance, except it absorbs the first 30 points of acid damage per attack.
Acid Resistance, Greater.notes: Caster Level: 11th Moderate aura. Prerequisites: Craft Magic Arms and Armor , resist energy Price +66,000 gp.

Acid Resistance, Improved.description: As acid resistance, except it absorbs the first 20 points of acid damage per attack.
Acid Resistance, Improved.notes: Caster Level: 7th Moderate aura. Prerequisites: Craft Magic Arms and Armor , resist energy Price +42,000 gp.

Acidic.description: Slick greenish sheen with acrid mist. Deals 2d4 acid damage per full round of contact to grapplers and objects in sustained direct contact (except held items). No damage for shorter contact like melee attacks.
Acidic.notes: Prerequisites: Craft Magic Arms and Armor, Melf’s acid arrow. Caster Level: 6th

Anchoring.description: Difficult to move in combat. +5 enhancement bonus on ability checks to resist bull rush, overrun, or trip attacks. Stylized anchors cover the item.
Anchoring.notes: Prerequisites: Craft Magic Arms and Armor, bull’s strength. Caster Level: 5th

Anchoring, Greater.description: +10 enhancement bonus on ability checks against bull rush, overrun, and trip attacks. (Synergy: requires Anchoring). Single stylized anchor on chest.
Anchoring, Greater.notes: Synergy Prerequisite: Anchoring. Caster Level: 10th. Moderate aura.

Animated.description: Upon command, an animated shield floats within 2 feet of the wielder, protecting her as if she were using it herself but freeing up both her hands. Only one shield can protect a character at a time. A character with an animated shield still takes any penalties associated with shield use, such as armor check penalty, arcane spell failure chance, and nonproficiency.
Animated.notes: Caster Level: 12th Strong aura. Prerequisites: Craft Magic Arms and Armor , animate objects Price +2 bonus.

Aporter.description: Aqua-tinged item. Activate to transport you and equipment to any spot within 800 feet you can visualize (as dimension door). 2/day.
Aporter.notes: Prerequisites: Craft Magic Arms and Armor, dimension door. Caster Level: 10th. Standard (mental) activation.

Arrow Catching.description: A shield with this ability attracts ranged weapons to it. It has a deflection bonus of +1 against ranged weapons because projectiles and thrown weapons veer toward it. Additionally, any projectile or thrown weapon aimed at a target within 5 feet of the shield’s wearer diverts from its original target and targets the shield’s bearer instead. (If the wielder has total cover relative to the attacker, the projectile or thrown weapon is not diverted.) Additionally, those attacking the wearer with ranged weapons ignore any miss chances that would normally apply. Projectiles and thrown weapons that have an enhancement bonus higher than the shield’s base AC bonus are not diverted to the wearer (but the shield’s increased AC bonus still applies against these weapons). The wielder can activate or deactivate this ability with a command word .
Arrow Catching.notes: Caster Level: 8th Moderate aura. Prerequisites: Craft Magic Arms and Armor , entropic shield Price +1 bonus.

Arrow Deflection.description: A shield with this ability protects the wielder from ranged attacks. Once per round when he would normally be struck by a ranged weapon, he can make a DC 20 Reflex save . If the ranged weapon has an enhancement bonus , the DC increases by that amount. If he succeeds, the shield deflects the weapon. He must be aware of the attack and not flat-footed . Attempting to deflect a ranged weapon doesn’t count as an action. Exceptional ranged weapons, such as boulders hurled by giants or acid arrows , can’t be deflected.
Arrow Deflection.notes: Caster Level: 5th Faint aura. Prerequisites: Craft Magic Arms and Armor , shield Price +2 bonus.

Averter.description: Finely wrought black shield. Activate: all enemies who see it must Will DC 14 save or be overcome by aversion; they do not approach within 30 feet for 3 rounds. Mind-affecting compulsion. 3/day.
Averter.notes: Prerequisites: Craft Magic Arms and Armor, suggestion or aversion. Caster Level: 5th. Standard (mental) activation.

Axeblock.description: Serrated surface with tiny knifelike edges. Turns away slashing weapons (axes, swords). Wearer gains DR 5/bludgeoning or piercing.
Axeblock.notes: Prerequisites: Craft Magic Arms and Armor, stoneskin. Caster Level: 7th

Bashing.description: A shield with this special ability is designed to perform a shield bash . A bashing shield deals damage as if it were a weapon of two size categories larger (a Medium light shield thus deals 1d6 points of damage and a Medium heavy shield deals 1d8 points of damage). The shield acts as a +1 weapon when used to bash. (Only light and heavy shields can have this ability.)
Bashing.notes: Caster Level: 8th Moderate aura. Prerequisites: Craft Magic Arms and Armor , bull’s strength Price +1 bonus.

Blinding.description: A shield with this ability flashes with a brilliant light up to twice per day upon command of the wielder. Anyone within 20 feet except the wielder must make a DC 14 Reflex save or be blinded for 1d4 rounds.
Blinding.notes: Caster Level: 7th Moderate aura. Prerequisites: Craft Magic Arms and Armor , searing light Price +1 bonus.

Called.description: Small beckoning hand image. Call the item to you from same plane (appears on body if no armor worn, or adjacent space). If other creature wore it since you last did, cannot call until you wear it again.
Called.notes: Prerequisites: Craft Magic Arms and Armor, teleport. Caster Level: 9th. Standard (command) activation.

Cold Resistance.description: A suit of armor or a shield with this property normally has a bluish, icy hue or is adorned with furs and shaggy pelts. The armor absorbs the first 10 points of cold damage per attack that the wearer would normally take (similar to the resist energy spell).
Cold Resistance.notes: Caster Level: 3rd Faint aura. Prerequisites: Craft Magic Arms and Armor , resist energy Price +18,000 gp.

Cold Resistance, Greater.description: As cold resistance, except it absorbs the first 30 points of cold damage per attack.
Cold Resistance, Greater.notes: Caster Level: 11th Moderate aura. Prerequisites: Craft Magic Arms and Armor , resist energy Price +66,000 gp.

Cold Resistance, Improved.description: As cold resistance, except it absorbs the first 20 points of cold damage per attack.
Cold Resistance, Improved.notes: Caster Level: 7th Moderate aura. Prerequisites: Craft Magic Arms and Armor , resist energy Price +42,000 gp.

Commander.description: Always brilliant and gleaming. +2 competence bonus on Diplomacy checks; allies within 30 ft gain +1 morale bonus on Will saves. -5 penalty on Hide checks due to shine.
Commander.notes: Prerequisites: Craft Magic Arms and Armor, eagle’s splendor. Caster Level: 5th

Daylight.description: Golden tinge with sun image. Activate to glow with daylight spell brilliance for up to 30 minutes per day (duration need not be continuous; swift action to toggle off).
Daylight.notes: Prerequisites: Craft Magic Arms and Armor, daylight. Caster Level: 5th. Swift (command) activation.

Death Ward.description: Black-enameled with translucent quality and white skull images. Activate to ignore any death effect (death spells, energy drain) or negative energy effect (inflict spells, chill touch). 1/day.
Death Ward.notes: Prerequisites: Craft Magic Arms and Armor, death ward. Caster Level: 7th. Immediate (mental) activation.

Electricity Resistance.description: A suit of armor or a shield with this property normally has a bluish hue and often bears a storm or lightning motif. The armor absorbs the first 10 points of electricity damage per attack that the wearer would normally take (similar to the resist energy spell).
Electricity Resistance.notes: Caster Level: 3rd Faint aura. Prerequisites: Craft Magic Arms and Armor , resist energy Price +18,000 gp.

Electricity Resistance, Greater.description: As electricity resistance, except it absorbs the first 30 points of electricity damage per attack.
Electricity Resistance, Greater.notes: Caster Level: 11th Moderate aura. Prerequisites: Craft Magic Arms and Armor , resist energy Price +66,000 gp.

Electricity Resistance, Improved.description: As electricity resistance, except it absorbs the first 20 points of electricity damage per attack.
Electricity Resistance, Improved.notes: Caster Level: 7th Moderate aura. Prerequisites: Craft Magic Arms and Armor , resist energy Price +42,000 gp.

Fire Resistance.description: A suit of armor with this ability normally has a reddish hue and often is decorated with a draconic motif. The armor absorbs the first 10 points of fire damage per attack that the wearer would normally take (similar to the resist energy spell).
Fire Resistance.notes: Caster Level: 3rd Faint aura. Prerequisites: Craft Magic Arms and Armor , resist energy Price +18,000 gp.

Fire Resistance, Greater.description: As fire resistance, except it absorbs the first 30 points of fire damage per attack.
Fire Resistance, Greater.notes: Caster Level: 11th Moderate aura. Prerequisites: Craft Magic Arms and Armor , resist energy Price +66,000 gp.

Fire Resistance, Improved.description: As fire resistance, except it absorbs the first 20 points of fire damage per attack.
Fire Resistance, Improved.notes: Caster Level: 7th Moderate aura. Prerequisites: Craft Magic Arms and Armor , resist energy Price +42,000 gp.

Fortification, Heavy.description: This suit of armor or shield negates critical hits and sneak attacks 100% of the time (as fortification).
Fortification, Heavy.notes:
Caster Level: 13th Moderate aura. Prerequisites: Craft Magic Arms and Armor , limited wish or miracle Price Modifier 

 Light 
 25% 
 +1 bonus 

 Moderate 
 75% 
 +3 bonus

 +5 bonus 

 Strong abjuration; CL 13th; Craft Magic Arms and Armor , limited wish or miracle ; Price varies (see above).

Fortification, Light.description: This suit of armor or shield negates critical hits and sneak attacks 25% of the time (as fortification).
Fortification, Light.notes:
Caster Level: 13th Moderate aura. Prerequisites: Craft Magic Arms and Armor , limited wish or miracle Price Modifier

 Strong abjuration; CL 13th; Craft Magic Arms and Armor , limited wish or miracle ; Price varies (see above).

Fortification, Moderate.description: This suit of armor or shield negates critical hits and sneak attacks 75% of the time (as fortification).
Fortification, Moderate.notes:
Caster Level: 13th Moderate aura. Prerequisites: Craft Magic Arms and Armor , limited wish or miracle Price Modifier 

 Light

 Moderate

 Heavy 
 100%

 Strong abjuration; CL 13th; Craft Magic Arms and Armor , limited wish or miracle ; Price varies (see above).

Ghost Touch.description: This armor or shield seems almost translucent. Both its enhancement bonus and its armor bonus count against the attacks of incorporeal creatures . It can be picked up, moved, and worn by incorporeal creatures at any time. Incorporeal creatures gain the armor or shield’s enhancement bonus against both corporeal and incorporeal attacks, and they can still pass freely through solid objects.
Ghost Touch.notes: Caster Level: 15th Strong aura. Prerequisites: Craft Magic Arms and Armor , etherealness Price +3 bonus.

Reflecting.description: This shield seems like a mirror. Its surface is completely reflective. Once per day, it can be called on to reflect a spell back at its caster exactly like the spell turning spell.
Reflecting.notes: Caster Level: 14th Strong aura. Prerequisites: Craft Magic Arms and Armor , spell turning Price +5 bonus.

Sonic Resistance.description: A suit of armor or a shield with this property normally has a glistening appearance. The armor absorbs the first 10 points of sonic damage per attack that the wearer would normally take (similar to the resist energy spell).
Sonic Resistance.notes: Caster Level: 3rd Faint aura. Prerequisites: Craft Magic Arms and Armor , resist energy Price +18,000 gp.

Sonic Resistance, Greater.description: As sonic resistance, except it absorbs the first 30 points of sonic damage per attack.
Sonic Resistance, Greater.notes: Caster Level: 11th Moderate aura. Prerequisites: Craft Magic Arms and Armor , resist energy Price +66,000 gp.

Sonic Resistance, Improved.description: As sonic resistance, except it absorbs the first 20 points of sonic damage per attack.
Sonic Resistance, Improved.notes: Caster Level: 7th Moderate aura. Prerequisites: Craft Magic Arms and Armor , resist energy Price +42,000 gp.

Spell Resistance (13).description: This armor or shield grants spell resistance 13 while worn.
Spell Resistance (13).notes: Caster Level: 15th Strong aura. Prerequisites: Craft Magic Arms and Armor , spell resistance Price +2 bonus (SR 13), +3 bonus (SR 15), +4 bonus (SR 17), or +5 bonus (SR 19).

Spell Resistance (15).description: This armor or shield grants spell resistance 15 while worn.
Spell Resistance (15).notes: Caster Level: 15th Strong aura. Prerequisites: Craft Magic Arms and Armor , spell resistance Price +2 bonus (SR 13), +3 bonus (SR 15), +4 bonus (SR 17), or +5 bonus (SR 19).

Spell Resistance (17).description: This armor or shield grants spell resistance 17 while worn.
Spell Resistance (17).notes: Caster Level: 15th Strong aura. Prerequisites: Craft Magic Arms and Armor , spell resistance Price +2 bonus (SR 13), +3 bonus (SR 15), +4 bonus (SR 17), or +5 bonus (SR 19).

Spell Resistance (19).description: This armor or shield grants spell resistance 19 while worn.
Spell Resistance (19).notes: Caster Level: 15th Strong aura. Prerequisites: Craft Magic Arms and Armor , spell resistance Price +2 bonus (SR 13), +3 bonus (SR 15), +4 bonus (SR 17), or +5 bonus (SR 19).

Undead Controlling.description: The wearer of a suit of armor or a shield with this property may control up to 26 HD of undead per day, as the control undead spell. At dawn each day, the wearer loses control of any undead still under his sway. Armor or a shield with this ability appears to be made of bone; this feature is entirely decorative and has no other effect on the armor.
Undead Controlling.notes: Caster Level: 13th Strong aura. Prerequisites: Craft Magic Arms and Armor , control undead Price +49,000 gp.

Wild.description: The wearer of a suit of armor or a shield with this ability preserves his armor bonus (and any enhancement bonus ) while in a wild shape. Armor and shields with this ability usually appear to be made covered in leaf patterns. While the wearer is in a wild shape, the armor cannot be seen.
Wild.notes: Caster Level: 9th Moderate aura. Prerequisites: Craft Magic Arms and Armor , baleful polymorph Price +3 bonus.
